PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-24-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Gemma O'Keeffe for (petitioner) Ladessa Gardner.

Ms. O'Keeffe reported that there have been no objections, that Ms. Gardner qualifies for and they are requesting full bond and that the probate examiner suggested bond in the amount of $240,000.00. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
